ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer owning the account */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the account was opened */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Checking, Savings) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the account */,
  "minimum_balance" REAL /* Minimum balance required for the account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the account related to the transaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_method" TEXT /* Method of the transaction (e.g., Online, In-Branch) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_number FOREIGN KEY ("account_number") REFERENCES accounts ("account_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the representative who handled the interaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Phone Call, Email) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details regarding the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification delivery (e.g., Sent, Failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Representative, Admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the user is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the branch */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the branch is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the branch is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the branch's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the branch */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the branch record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the branch record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)
